name: Bill White Courts
description: Come play pickleball at Bill White Courts in Dallas, OR! There are 4 outdoor hard courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. Amenities include water. The courts are free.

name: City of Dallas Pickleball Courts
description: Come play pickleball at City of Dallas Pickleball Courts in Dallas, OR! There are 4 outdoor hard courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. The courts are free. The facility includes amenities like lights.

name: Monmouth LDS Church
description: Monmouth LDS Church is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Monmouth, OR. There are 3 indoor wood courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. Amenities include restrooms, water, wheelchair accessibility, and lights. The courts are private.

name: Western Oregon University - Peter Courtney Health and Wellness Center
description:
Access is either through a day pass or a term membership. Please visit wou.edu/campusrec/memberships/ for more information on Community Memberships.

Parking is available with six metered spots that cost $.25 per 30 minutes for individuals who do not have a WOU parking permit. Additionally, those six metered spots are to be used for ADA parking (be sure to display your state-issued disability placard, as you do not have to pay the meter), and there is free on-street parking on Jackson St West. Unfortunately, parking tickets do get issued if you park in Lot R or the meter runs out.

Please give us a call if you have any questions at 503-838-9530.
open_play_schedule: Peter Courtney Health and Wellness Facility Hours are located (wou.edu/campusrec/hours), please visit to see about holiday hours and December hours, which are limited.
